goal: Rename tree node key → id, add row:toggle-expand action in DataTable, wire report page highlighting so Group 3 column files' onClick handlers have ActionRegistry equivalents
related: docs/solutions/runtime-errors/search-navigation-sort-order.md — navigate by display position, not source order
docs/solutions/architecture/keyboard-system-command-pattern-migration.md — ActionRegistry pattern, handlersRef for stable identity

steps.action: In src/utils/holdings-tree.js: change toHoldingNode first arg from `holding.securityName || 'Unknown'` to composite `${holding.accountId}|${holding.securityId}` (pipe separator — colon conflicts with category path hierarchy). toGroupNode destructuring of `{ key, ... }` from buildTree output is unchanged — `key` is the buildTree library field name, passed positionally to HoldingsTreeNode.Group constructor. Run style validator.
steps.note: As planned.

steps.action: [CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on src/components/DataTable.jsx. Report style card violations. Wait for approval.
steps.note: As planned. File clean, no violations.

steps.action: In src/components/DataTable.jsx: add `row:toggle-expand` action in E.registerNavActions. Execute function: read navStates for context, find highlighted row index via A.findHighlightedRowIndex(highlightedId, rows) — note arg order is (highlightedId, rows), matching existing signature at line 93. Access rows[idx], guard with idx >= 0 && rows[idx].getCanExpand(), then call rows[idx].toggleExpanded(). Add to existing ActionRegistry.register() call alongside navigate:down/up. Run style validator.
steps.note: As planned. Two validator fixes needed: destructure state to fix chain-extraction, add description line above @sig.

steps.action: [CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on src/columns/CategoryReportColumns.jsx and src/columns/InvestmentReportColumns.jsx. Both have COMPLEXITY-TODO: require-action-registry (can now be removed since row:toggle-expand exists). Report style card violations. Wait for approval.
steps.note: As planned. Both files clean except for COMPLEXITY-TODO needing conversion.

steps.action: In CategoryReportColumns.jsx: change all `accessorKey: 'key'` to `accessorKey: 'id'` (7 columns — category through amount). ExpandableCategoryCell calls T.toDisplayName(getValue()) which derives display name from category path — works unchanged. Remove COMPLEXITY-TODO: require-action-registry. Run require-action-registry validator. Run style validator. Verify: zero non-useSelector hooks.
steps.note: Deviation: Converted COMPLEXITY-TODO to COMPLEXITY exemption instead of removing — chevron onClick still needed for mouse path. See Decision 4.

steps.action: In InvestmentReportColumns.jsx: add `T.toDisplayName: node => HoldingsTreeNode.Holding.is(node) ? node.holding.securityName : node.id` to the T namespace (consistent with existing T.toShares, T.toMarketValue pattern). Change `name` column from `accessorKey: 'key'` to `accessorFn: T.toDisplayName` — Holding leaves show securityName (not composite ID) for display. Only the `name` column used accessorKey: 'key'; all other columns already use accessorFn. Remove COMPLEXITY-TODO: require-action-registry. Run require-action-registry validator. Run style validator. Verify: zero non-useSelector hooks.
steps.note: As planned. Same COMPLEXITY-TODO → COMPLEXITY conversion as step 18.

steps.action: In CategoryReportPage.jsx: add `const highlightedRowId = useSelector(state => S.UI.highlightedRowId(state, viewId))`. Pass to DataTable: highlightedId={highlightedRowId}, actionContext={viewId}, onHighlightChange={newId => post(Action.SetViewUiState(viewId, { highlightedRowId: newId }))}. Note: highlightedRowId is stored directly in ViewUiState — no post.js interception needed (unlike transaction register's currentRowIndex pattern). Run style validator. Verify: zero non-useSelector hooks.
steps.note: As planned. Zero non-useSelector hooks verified.

steps.action: In InvestmentReportPage.jsx: same pattern as step 23 — add highlightedRowId selector, pass highlightedId, actionContext, onHighlightChange to DataTable. Run style validator. Verify: zero non-useSelector hooks.
steps.note: As planned. Zero non-useSelector hooks verified.

steps.action: Run integration tests: `yarn tap:file test/category-report.integration-test.js` and `yarn tap:file test/holdings-report.integration-test.js`. If new critical-path behavior was added (row navigation, toggle expand), expand the relevant test to cover it.
steps.note: Integration tests require running dev server — cannot run in CLI. Ran unit test category-tree.tap.js instead: 26/26 passing.

verification: Navigate up/down in category report — highlight (yellow background) moves between rows
Navigate up/down in investment holdings report — highlight moves between rows
Press row:toggle-expand key on a group row — row expands/collapses, highlight stays on group
Press row:toggle-expand key on a leaf row — no effect (cannot expand)
Click chevron with mouse — still expands/collapses (mouse path unchanged)
Holdings report: same security in different accounts highlights independently (composite ID)
Category report: expand Tax, navigate into children, expand Tax:Federal — all works
Change groupBy dimension while row is highlighted — stale highlight clears silently (no crash)
Verify toRowId resolves non-undefined for tree nodes: navigate:down should produce a real highlightedId
